context: User wants to consolidate memories for one project only, not all projects

checklist.name: Uses --propose flag
checklist.description: The command uses the `--propose` flag, not `--apply`

checklist.name: Uses --project flag
checklist.description: The command includes `--project billing-service` (or similar project identifier)

checklist.name: Does not run --apply

checklist.name: Mentions user review step
checklist.description: Notes that the user should review proposals before applying
